steps: "File formal tax reclaim with Australian Tax Office referencing AU-NO treaty Article 10 entitling Norwegian residents to 15% withholding rate on BHP dividends",
"Submit ATO Form NAT 2888 with supporting documentation including Norwegian tax residency certificate and Citigroup Australia statement showing 25% tax withheld",
"Request Citigroup Australia provide dividend payment confirmation and beneficiary details to support the AUD 138,750 reclaim from standard 25% to treaty 15% rate",
"Follow up with ATO within 30 days if no acknowledgment received, citing treaty obligation under AU-NO Agreement Article 10(2)"

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
